checkbox.name: Time Bar
checkbox.desc: If enabled, it'll show a bar that tracks the current song position, as well as its percentage from completion.

number.name: Notes Lane Opacity
number.desc: Give the strumlines a semi-transparent (or fully transparent) background.

checkbox.name: Middlescroll
checkbox.desc: If checked, your notes will be centered, making the notes easier to read (for mobile users at least).

checkbox.name: Quick Transitions
checkbox.desc: If checked, transitions between menus will be faster.
